description: Social and Sharing Enhancements (items 61-70): Share cards, QR code sharing, 'Now Playing' status card, playlist sharing links, embed widget, copy lyrics to clipboard, Twitter/X share integration, Instagram story format cards, music taste profile page, and artist comparison mode.
steps: 1. Create app/components/social/ShareCard.tsx: generate beautiful image cards of currently playing song using Canvas API - draw artwork, track name, artist, and gradient background. Allow saving as PNG via toDataURL.

2. Create app/components/social/QRCodeGenerator.tsx: generate QR codes linking to any artist/album/track page using a canvas-based QR code generator (implement simple QR encoding or use SVG path generation). Show QR in a modal.

3. Create app/components/social/NowPlayingCard.tsx: shareable 'currently listening to...' card with artwork, track info, progress bar, and timestamp. Styled as a social media card. Use canvas for image export.

4. Enhance playlist sharing: encode playlist as compressed URL parameters (JSON -> base64 in URL). Create app/playlists/shared/page.tsx that decodes URL and shows the shared playlist with 'Import' button.
5. Create app/embed/page.tsx: an embeddable mini player widget page designed for iframe embedding on blogs/websites. Minimal UI with artwork, track name, play button. Accept trackId as URL parameter.
6. Enhance app/components/LyricsDisplay.tsx: add a 'Copy Lyrics' button that copies all lyrics text to clipboard using navigator.clipboard.writeText(). Show toast notification on success.
7. Enhance app/components/ShareMenu.tsx: add 'Share to Twitter/X' button with pre-filled text (track name, artist, link) using https://twitter.com/intent/tweet URL. Add share to other platforms.

8. Create app/components/social/InstagramStoryCard.tsx: generate vertical (9:16 aspect ratio) share cards sized for Instagram stories using Canvas API. Include large artwork, track name, gradient background.

9. Create app/profile/page.tsx: music taste profile page showing top genres (pie chart), top artists (grid), listening stats, achievement badges, and taste summary. Pull data from analytics/personalization stores.
10. Create app/components/ArtistComparison.tsx and app/compare/page.tsx: compare two artists side-by-side showing genres, album count, and latest releases. Allow selecting artists via search.
acceptance_criteria: Share card generates a downloadable image of current song
QR code generates and displays for any page URL
Now Playing card shows shareable current listening status
Playlist sharing via URL parameter works for import/export
Embed widget page renders mini player suitable for iframes
Copy lyrics button copies text to clipboard with confirmation
Twitter/X share opens intent with pre-filled track info
Instagram story cards generate in 9:16 aspect ratio
/profile page shows comprehensive music taste overview
verification: bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
